About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 2007, HDB Financial Services Limited (HDBFS) is a non-deposit-taking NBFC and a subsidiary of HDFC Bank engaged in providing lending solutions.
[1]
Key Points
Business Overview:
[1]
HDB Financial Services Ltd is a non-deposit-taking NBFC and a subsidiary of HDFC Bank. Classified as an Upper Layer NBFC by the RBI, the company offers lending solutions to individuals, micro enterprises, and businesses through a diversified portfolio across
Enterprise Lending, Asset Finance, and Consumer Finance
segments.
